tspan.tspan: This tool could help you debug your program!

flowRoot.flowPara: Building an effective tool that truly achieves its goals involves several challenges. The problem is inherently undecidable, as it would require solving termination (an already known undecidable problem). Moreover, the extraction process can produce extremely large automata. Significant effort has been dedicated to ensuring a correct and practical synthesis of the automaton.

in analyzing existing codebases by exploiting the
classic bugs in distributed systems, particularly in the
every possible behavior (good or bad) is highlighted.
